title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
summary: Tencent WorkBuddy is a desktop AI agent for productivity work that reads files, analyzes spreadsheets, generates reports and presentations, coordinates expert agents, and connects to external tools via integrations and remote control. It includes 100+ domain-specific experts, multi-agent workflows, integrations with GitHub, Jira, Slack, and others, plus a skill marketplace for extended capabilities like web search and transcription.
writeup: The video covers Tencent WorkBuddy, a desktop AI agent aimed at productivity work that reads files, analyzes spreadsheets, and generates reports and presentations while coordinating specialized agents and connecting to outside tools through integrations and remote control. It matters as another entry in the agentic productivity space, positioning multi-agent orchestration plus tool connectivity as the core value. Concrete takeaways: WorkBuddy ships with over 100 domain-specific experts, supports multi-agent workflows, integrates with GitHub, Jira, Slack, and others, and offers a skill marketplace that adds capabilities such as web search and transcription.
